solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        s = bin(n)[2:]
        for i in range(1, len(s)):
            if s[i] == s[i - 1]:
                return False
        return True
```
efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution converts the integer to its binary representation and checks if any two adjacent bits are the same. It is efficient for small to medium-sized integers but uses extra space for the binary string.>
